headline.text: L3 ML4 found *cardboard* blocking chocolate flow in back-off plow — QA saved sample, line down 34 minutes.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran steady with no production issues in the window. Teams worked on environmental cleaning for S4 TG and resolved minor facility issues including condensation in the dishwasher exhaust area.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 faced equipment challenges across multiple lines. FFS had a 35-minute stop for bag folding issues, resolved. ML2 lost 3 of 4 ingredient mixers; Alan ordered replacements. ML2 PTL pump failed at 01:05, maintenance replaced and line restarted at 01:54. ML3 feed device belt broke at 17:56, replaced in 11 minutes.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML4 had the most significant issue: cardboard found blocking chocolate flow in the back-off plow bin at 05:13, causing a 34-minute stop. Return pump had been left in manual mode instead of auto. Gondola broke bars at entrance at 08:20, requiring a reference run and resolved at 09:15. ML1 had tempering issues overnight causing 80+ molds to stick with chocolate.

watchlist.reason: ML1 metal detector still rejecting all test cards with electric current present when removing trays — open 2 days, no resolution yet.
PECO pallet inventory remains at critical low (72 vs 1,620 minimum) — open 2 days, blocking L1 staging space.

notes.text: Alan Todd ordered three additional ingredient mixers for ML2 to establish backup inventory after losing three units in one shift.
Second barrel lifter for ML4 arrived and installed; Marcos Montano handled uncrating and setup with QA inspection.

closed_today.title: FFS bag folding malfunction — pouches coming out partially folded
closed_today.summary: FFS bag folder malfunctioned causing partial folds on pouches; maintenance corrected in 35 minutes.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Line running again at 06:48 — "Line is running"

closed_today.title: ML2 PTL pump failure — buffer dropped to 45%
closed_today.summary: PTL pump failed causing buffer to drop to 45%; maintenance replaced and ATP-cleared the pump, back online in 55 minutes.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Pump working again at 01:54 — "Pump is in and working"

closed_today.title: ML3 feed device belt broke — line down 11 minutes
closed_today.summary: Feed device belt broke during second shift; maintenance replaced the belt and line restarted in 11 minutes.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Line back up at 18:07 — "We are up and running"

closed_today.title: ML4 gondola breaking bars at entrance — reference run required
closed_today.summary: Gondola broke chocolate bars at entrance requiring reference run to re-zero position; Nelson Cook resolved in 55 minutes.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Gondola resolved at 09:15 — "Gondola issue got resolved at 9:15am."

opened_today.title: FFS bag folding malfunction — pouches coming out partially folded
opened_today.summary: FFS bag folder malfunctioned causing partial folds on pouches; maintenance corrected in 35 minutes.

opened_today.title: ML2 ingredient mixer shortage — 3 of 4 mixers failed
opened_today.summary: Three ingredient mixers failed with electrical and computer issues; temporary solution found but three replacements ordered to ensure line capacity.

opened_today.title: ML2 PTL pump failure — buffer dropped to 45%
opened_today.summary: PTL pump failed causing buffer to drop to 45%; maintenance replaced and ATP-cleared the pump, back online in 55 minutes.

opened_today.summary: Feed device belt broke during second shift; maintenance replaced the belt and line restarted in 11 minutes.

opened_today.title: ML4 cardboard found in back-off plow bin blocking chocolate flow
opened_today.summary: Cardboard found blocking chocolate flow in back-off plow bin — QA saved sample for investigation, 34-minute line stop to clear.

opened_today.title: ML4 back-off plow return pump left in manual mode causing bin overflow
opened_today.summary: Return pump left in manual mode caused back-off plow bin to overflow; crew switched to auto and restarted after cleanup.

opened_today.title: ML4 gondola breaking bars at entrance — reference run required
opened_today.summary: Gondola broke chocolate bars at entrance requiring reference run to re-zero position; Nelson Cook resolved in 55 minutes.

opened_today.title: ML1 tempering issues overnight — 80+ molds stuck with chocolate
opened_today.summary: Tempering ran high overnight requiring reheat; line started before reaching correct temperature causing 80+ molds to stick with chocolate.
